2026-05-09.explanation: Telegram Mini-Apps are lightweight decentralized applications integrated into Telegram that leverage TON blockchain capabilities, allowing users to interact with dApps without leaving the messenger.

options.A: To replace Telegram's native messaging protocol with blockchain transactions
options.B: To enable decentralized applications that run directly within Telegram clients
options.C: To serve as the exclusive payment processor for Telegram Premium subscriptions
options.D: To archive all Telegram user data on TON smart contracts

2026-05-09.question: What is the primary function of Telegram Mini-Apps within the TON ecosystem?
